name: Noord-Beveland (Netherlands)
description: A white field with a red band at the hoist, bearing the crowned municipal coat of arms (a black chief with two gold stars over black-and-white waves and a red mascle).
history: Flag of the municipality of Noord-Beveland, an island municipality in the province of Zeeland.

features.role: a red band at the hoist
the crowned municipal arms: a black chief with two gold stars, black-and-white waves, and a red mascle
